body.processed:
Breaking Changes

  • Minimum Node.js version bumped to 20 LTS
  • Legacy REST API removed in favor of GraphQL
  • Config file format changed to YAML

New Features

  • Real-time collaboration for content editing
  • AI-powered content suggestions
  • Built-in image optimization pipeline
  • Multi-tenant workspace support

Improvements

  • 50% reduction in cold start time
  • Redesigned admin dashboard
  • Improved TypeScript type generation

body.processed:
New Features

  • Webhook management UI
  • Content scheduling with timezone support
  • Bulk import/export via CLI

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed memory leak in long-running preview sessions
  • Corrected pagination cursor behavior on filtered queries
  • Resolved race condition in concurrent content updates

body.processed:
Bug Fixes

  • Patched XSS vulnerability in rich text field sanitization
  • Fixed Docker image build failure on ARM64 architecture
  • Corrected OAuth token refresh timing issue

Security

This release addresses CVE-2025-12345, a moderate-severity cross-site scripting vulnerability. All users on v2.11.x are encouraged to upgrade immediately.
